leadText: Guard Dog (Japanese: ばんけん Guard Dog) is an Ability introduced in Generation IX.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] This Ability prevents other Pokémon from forcing the Pokémon with this Ability to switch out or flee with a move (e.g. Roar , Circle Throw , etc.) or item ( Red Card ). Guard Dog does not affect the Pokémon switching out manually, or switching out or fleeing with its own move (e.g. Baton Pass , Teleport , etc.) or item ( Eject Button and Eject Pack ). Additionally, if a Pokémon with this ability is affected by Intimidate , its Attack stat will increase by one stage, rather than decreasing by one stage. Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] Guard Dog has no effect outside of battle.

sections.title: In battle
sections.text: In battle [ edit | edit source ] This Ability prevents other Pokémon from forcing the Pokémon with this Ability to switch out or flee with a move (e.g. Roar , Circle Throw , etc.) or item ( Red Card ). Guard Dog does not affect the Pokémon switching out manually, or switching out or fleeing with its own move (e.g. Baton Pass , Teleport , etc.) or item ( Eject Button and Eject Pack ). Additionally, if a Pokémon with this ability is affected by Intimidate , its Attack stat will increase by one stage, rather than decreasing by one stage.
